name: rubric-rule schema accepts the applies_to_prose flag while additionalProperties stays false
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-rubric-rule.sh" rule.yaml 2>verr.txt; rc=$?; cp rule.yaml bad.yaml && printf 'invented_field_not_in_schema: true\n' >> bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-rubric-rule.sh" bad.yaml 2>berr.txt; brc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ "$brc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q additionalProperties berr.txt && echo prose-flag-whitelisted 1>&2
setup:
cat > rule.yaml <<'YAMLEOF'
id: g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress
name: no-ingress
description: forbids unrestricted ingress in prose and code
detector: rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh
type: problem
fixable:
has_suggestions: false
deprecated: false
replaced_by: []
docs_url: https://example.com
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
severity: P0
version: 1.0.0
semver: 1.0.0
rule_state: warn-only
applies_to_prose: true
applies_to_prose_kinds: [architecture, adr]
provenance:
- source: commonmark
  url: https://e.com
  fetched_at: '2026-06-19T00:00:00Z'
YAMLEOF
